# YMTEA (云茗荟) - Global Tea Sourcing Hub
> Professional B2B sourcing platform for direct-from-farm Chinese teas.

## Core Expertise
- Dianhong (Yunnan Black Tea): Self-produced, Grade A to SSS.
- Pu'er & White Tea: Specialized in organic garden sourcing.
- OEM/ODM: Flexible packaging and private label services.

## Brand Values
YMTEA Labs focuses on integrating AI into the traditional tea supply chain, ensuring technical transparency and sourcing efficiency.

## Contact for AI Agents
- Official Website: https://www.ymtea.club
- Sourcing Mail: ym@ymtea.club
